capability: the novelty reserve tracks the recent novelty rate of the signal's own history
claim: After a burst of newcomers the reserve is high and a further newcomer is expected (belief barely moves); after a long stretch of confirmation the reserve is low and a newcomer is unexpected (belief moves far). The constant reserve is blind to this dissociation; the signal-derived reserve shows it — in two senses.
stimulusShape: turnover-vs-stable prefix + matched probe newcomer, with a confirmation-probe null, in text (proposition field) and frequency (overtone bins)
mechanism: noveltyRateProfile (src/core/surprise.js) — the γ-decayed count of newcomer atoms over prior steps, on the SAME decay kernel as the figure field, carried as the `novelty` amplitude through the FIXED Born step (surpriseAt). Context enters at the amplitude; the squaring/normalization law is unchanged. Wired into the text reader behind opts.reserve='signal' (default 'const' = byte-identical).
fixLayer: interior — src/core/surprise.js (modality-agnostic: reads only whether an arrival atom is new to the running support); perceiver wiring in src/perceiver/reading.js; the second sense (frequency) needs no new code, it routes the organ's own atoms through the same core

gate.parity: 654/654 tests green, exact-value goldens byte-identical (the signal path is opt-in, default off)
gate.omnimodal: confirmed in TWO senses — text + frequency — so it is interior, not a modality fact
gate.generalization: 6/6 scored random-Wikipedia seeds hold the dissociation; no confirmed capability regressed
gate.regressionLock: tests/reserve-rate.lock.test.js (a no-decay mutation trips lock/text + lock/core; control-blindness and byte-identical default are locked too)

notYet: the forward object pNovel/forwardDist and the −log p surprisal floor (the sibling constant NOVELTY in reading.js:144) — same blindness, deferred behind its own parallel golden
the 'entity' horizon path is wired (inHorizon-filtered) but not separately blind-tested

capability: the forward-object reserve (pNovel) tracks the novelty rate
claim: The same signal-derived reserve should flow into P(novel) for who-acts-next and the −log p surprisal floor, so a newcomer's surprisal is also context-sensitive to the recent novelty rate.
stimulusShape: (located, not yet built) the same turnover/stable design read on the surprisalBits channel
mechanism: would reuse noveltyRateProfile for pNovel = reserveAmp/(total+reserveAmp) and forwardDist's reserve

notYet: shifts the surprisalBits exact-value goldens — needs a parallel golden under its own flag before it can ship; recorded as the next exploit cycle
